user_story: Como usuário, eu quero ver claramente quando um dos meus check-ins foi rejeitado, para entender o resultado da moderação.
test_output_summary: ✓ All 257 tests passed (53 test files). Frontend component tests verified that: (1) StatusBadge renders 'Rejeitado' with neutral gray color (text-muted-foreground) for status='rejected' (RF-017), (2) CheckInActions component returns null for rejected check-ins showing no action buttons (RF-011), (3) Non-admin users on /check-ins page see no action buttons regardless of status (RF-012).
notes: Implementation verified through code inspection and acceptance tests. CheckInItem.tsx correctly implements StatusBadge with XCircle icon and neutral color styling. CheckInActions.tsx correctly returns null when status='rejected', ensuring no buttons are displayed. Page-level tests confirm non-admin users cannot see action buttons. All frontend tests pass without issues.
